message:
fix(hypothesis): prevent NaN/Infinity from passing numeric validation

- Add Number.isFinite() checks for confidence, version, and likelihood
- Add Number.isInteger() check for version field
- Fix confound ID validation to check for whitespace-only strings
- Update type guards with same NaN/Infinity protections

These edge cases would previously pass validation:
- confidence: NaN (typeof NaN === "number", NaN < 0 is false)
- version: 1.5 (positive but not integer)
- confounds[0].id: "   " (whitespace-only)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
